title: 多语言代码块图标测试

messages.content: 请用尽可能多的编程语言各写一小段代码，用来测试代码块的语言图标与名称显示。

下面每段都标注了不同语言，覆盖「有专属图标」与「走缩写占位」两类： ```python print("hello") ``` ```typescript const x: number = 1 ``` ```tsx const A = (): JSX.Element =>
``` ```jsx const B = () => hi ``` ```vue ``` ```c int main(void) { return 0; } ``` ```cpp std::cout << 42 << std::endl; ``` ```csharp Console.WriteLine(42); ``` ```php ``` ```lua print(1) ``` ```r x <- c(1, 2, 3) ``` ```racket (display (+ 1 2)) ``` ```fortran print *, 'hi' ``` ```pascal writeln('hi'); ``` ```zig const x = 1; ``` ```powershell Write-Host 'hi' ``` ```yaml name: contextsend version: 1 ``` ```toml name = "contextsend" version = 1 ``` ```latex E = \frac{1}{2} m v^2 ``` ```sql SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE id = 1; ``` ```bash echo hi && ls -la ``` 以下这些没有专属图标，应显示「圆角矩形 + 右下角缩写」占位： ```javascript console.log(123) ``` ```rust fn main() { let x = 1; } ``` ```go package main ``` ```java System.out.println(1); ``` ```ruby puts 1 ``` ```swift print(1) ``` ```kotlin fun main() { println(1) } ``` ```html
hi
``` ```css a { color: red; } ``` ```json { "a": 1, "b": [1, 2, 3] } ``` ```dockerfile FROM node:20 ``` ```graphql query { me { id name } } ``` 最后是一段未指定语言的代码块： ``` plain text without language ```
